name: Hunkar Begendi (Roasted Eggplant Puree)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Kasher/kasseri cheese, freshly grated or use Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
First, roast the eggplants in the following fashion:
1. Prick each eggplant 3 or 4 times with the tines of a long-handled fork.
2. Impale them on the fork and turn over a gas flame until the skin chars and begins to crack.
- If using an electric stove, pierce the eggplants, place them on a large baking sheet, and broil 4 inches from the heat.
3. Remove any badly charred spots.
4. Cut the eggplants in half lengthwise and chop finely.
5. Mash the pulp to a smooth puree with the back of a spoon or mortar and pestle.
6. In a heavy saucepan, melt butter over moderate heat.
7. Stir in flour until absorbed.
8. Pour in milk all at once and stir vigorously with a whisk.
9. Cook over high heat until the mixture boils and thickens.
10. Beat in the pureed eggplant, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 5 minutes.
11. Add cheese, salt, and pepper; beat until thick enough to hold its shape on a spoon.
Taste for seasoning and serve immediately. Traditionally accompanies roast or braised veal or lamb.
